Theme Comparison

Cedar (Dark)
Zen (Light)

Emotional Glow Colors

Color tokens for emotional glow states - used by avatar and UI elements to create warmth and connection.

Emotional Glow Palette

Each emotional state has a corresponding glow color that the avatar and UI elements use to communicate feeling.

Neutral

#f5f5f5

Default idle state - soft white glow

Resting, neutral presence

Joy

#ffd700

Happiness, delight - warm gold

Celebrations, positive moments, achievements

Concern

#daa520

Empathy, worry - goldenrod

When detecting distress, showing care

Excitement

#ff6b6b

High energy, enthusiasm - coral red

Exciting news, energetic conversations

Calm

#87ceeb

Peace, tranquility - sky blue

Breathing exercises, relaxation, grounding

Empathy

#ffb6c1

Compassion, understanding - light pink

Deep listening, emotional support

Focus

#4fc3f7

Concentration, attention - bright blue

Task focus, planning, productivity

Celebration

#ffc107

Achievement, success - amber

Milestones, wins, special occasions

Wisdom

#b8956a

Insight, reflection - warm tan

Nayan's wisdom moments, deep insights

Love

#ff69b4

Affection, warmth - hot pink

Connection, relationship moments

Protective

#deb887

Safety, security - burlywood

Reassurance, guardian moments

Glow Gradients

Compound glow gradients for complex emotional states.

Joyful Celebration

Joy + Celebration blend

Calm Focus

Calm + Focus blend for productive relaxation

Warm Empathy

Empathy + Protective for deep support

Excited Joy

Excitement + Joy for peak happiness

Wisdom Calm

Wisdom + Calm for reflective moments

Glow Intensity

Intensity levels control how prominent the emotional glow appears.

Subtle

  • Opacity: 0.3
  • Blur: 15px
  • Spread: 5px

Barely visible, ambient

Normal

  • Opacity: 0.5
  • Blur: 25px
  • Spread: 10px

Standard presence

Strong

  • Opacity: 0.7
  • Blur: 35px
  • Spread: 15px

Enhanced emotional state

Intense

  • Opacity: 0.9
  • Blur: 45px
  • Spread: 20px

Peak emotional moment

Persona Glow Modifiers

Each persona subtly shifts the glow colors to match their personality.

Ferni

  • Base Hue: 0°
  • Saturation: 1.0×

Standard warm glow

Maya

  • Base Hue: -10°
  • Saturation: 0.95×

Slightly cooler, organized energy

Peter

  • Base Hue: +15°
  • Saturation: 1.1×

Warmer, more vibrant

Jordan

  • Base Hue: +5°
  • Saturation: 1.15×

Celebratory, saturated

Alex

  • Base Hue: -5°
  • Saturation: 0.9×

Professional, subtle

Nayan

  • Base Hue: +10°
  • Saturation: 0.85×

Wise, muted warmth
